# InMemoryTaskStore.OnUpdate property

An optional listener invoked with a task's id on every observable status change (§25.10). The server wires this to fan a `notifications/tasks` push so background work driven by a task-augmented tool (status advances, completion, failure) reaches subscribed clients without an extra poll. Mirrors the TypeScript `setUpdateListener`. Set to `null` to disable.

```csharp
public Action<string>? OnUpdate { get; set; }
```
